name: Buttermilk Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and sugar.
2. Add the softened butter to the dry ingredients. Cut in with a pastry blender or your fingers until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Gradually add the buttermilk, stirring until just combined. The dough should be crumbly and moist.
4. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Knead lightly 4 to 5 times.
5. Roll the dough to about 1/2-inch thickness. Cut into circles using a 2-1/2 inch biscuit cutter.
6. Place the biscuits on a lightly greased baking sheet.
7. Brush the tops with melted butter.
8. Bake at 450°F for 8 minutes or until golden brown.
Note: When cutting biscuits, never twist the cutter; this will seal the edges and prevent proper rising. If the cutter is not cutting all the way through, consider using a new cutter.
